    net/gemserv: Update to 0.6.6

    ChangeLog: https://git.sr.ht/~int80h/gemserv/tree/v0.6.6/item/README#L79

    This update fixes a security issue for which there is no CVE assigned:

    https://git.sr.ht/~int80h/gemserv/refs
